stages.concept:
# Unit 156: if의 생략 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **가정법에서 if의 생략**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 가정법에서 **if를 생략**하면 **주어와 동사(were/had/should)가 도치**돼요!

👩‍🏫 선생님: **가정법 과거** — If + 주어 + were → **Were + 주어**

> **If** I **were** rich, I would travel.
> → **Were** I rich, I would travel.
> 내가 부자라면, 여행할 텐데.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **가정법 과거완료** — If + 주어 + had p.p. → **Had + 주어 + p.p.**

> **If** I **had known**, I would have told you.
> → **Had** I **known**, I would have told you.
> 알았더라면, 너에게 말해줬을 텐데.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **should 가정법** — If + 주어 + should → **Should + 주어**

> **If** it **should** rain, take an umbrella.
> → **Should** it rain, take an umbrella.
> 혹시 비가 온다면, 우산을 가져가라.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 정리:

| 원래 | if 생략 (도치) |
|------|------|
| If I were ~ | Were I ~ |
| If I had p.p. ~ | Had I p.p. ~ |
| If ~ should ~ | Should ~ |

**Q. 다음 문장의 if를 생략하여 바르게 고쳐 쓴 것을 고르세요.**
"If she had been there, she could have helped us."
1. Had she been there, she could have helped us. ✅
2. She had been there, she could have helped us.
3. Had been she there, she could have helped us.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 훌륭해요! if가 생략되면 조동사 역할을 하는 had가 주어(she) 앞으로 튀어나가 도치가 일어나므로 'Had she been' 구문이 완성된답니다. p.p. 형태인 been은 주어 뒤에 그대로 남아있어요!

🧑‍🎓 학생: if를 생략하면 were/had/should가 앞으로! 도치가 핵심이군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 156: if의 생략 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 보기 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I were you, I would study harder.
→ (     ) I you, I would study harder.
> **정답** Were

---

**02.** If he had known the truth, he would have told us.
→ (     ) he known the truth, he would have told us.
> **정답** Had

---

**03.** If I should see him, I would tell him.
→ (     ) I see him, I would tell him.
> **정답** Should

---

**04.** If she were here, she would help.
→ (     ) she here, she would help.
> **정답** Were

---

**05.** If it had rained, the game would have been canceled.
→ (     ) it rained, the game would have been canceled.
> **정답** Had

---

**06.** if를 생략하여 도치 문장으로 바꾸시오.
If I were a bird, I would fly.
> **정답** Were I a bird, I would fly.

---

**07.** If he had come earlier, he would have met her.
> **정답** Had he come earlier, he would have met her.

---

**08.** If I should find the key, I will call you.
> **정답** Should I find the key, I will call you.

---

**09.** If she were rich, she would travel.
> **정답** Were she rich, she would travel.

---

**10.** If they had studied, they would have passed.
> **정답** Had they studied, they would have passed.

---

**11.** 도치 문장을 if 가정법으로 바꾸시오.
Were I you, I would go.
> **정답** If I were you, I would go.

---

**12.** Had she known, she would have helped.
> **정답** If she had known, she would have helped.

---

**13.** Should it rain, we will stay home.
> **정답** If it should rain, we will stay home.

---

**14.** Were he here, he would agree.
> **정답** If he were here, he would agree.

---

**15.** Had I seen him, I would have said hello.
> **정답** If I had seen him, I would have said hello.

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
내가 너라면 열심히 공부할 텐데. (도치)
Were you I would I study harder
> **정답** Were / I / you / I / would / study / harder

---

**17.** 그가 왔더라면 그녀를 만났을 텐데. (도치)
Had come he earlier would he have met her
> **정답** Had / he / come / earlier / he / would / have / met / her

---

**18.** 혹시 비가 오면 집에 있을 것이다. (도치)
Should rain it we will stay home
> **정답** Should / it / rain / we / will / stay / home

---

**19.** 그녀가 부자라면 여행할 텐데. (도치)
Were rich she would she travel
> **정답** Were / she / rich / she / would / travel

---

**20.** 공부했더라면 통과했을 텐데. (도치)
Had studied they would they have passed
> **정답** Had / they / studied / they / would / have / passed
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 156: if의 생략 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I were you, I would take that present.
→ ________________ I you, I would take that present.
If
Was
Were
am
> **정답** Were

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I had known about that new model, I would have
bought it.
→ __________________ I known about that new
model, I would have bought it.
If
Have
Were
Had
> **정답** Had

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If the weather had not been so bad, we could have
gone out.
→ ___________________ so bad, we could have gone
out.
The weather had not been
Had not the weather been
Have the weather not been
Had the weather not been
> **정답** Had the weather not been

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Were it warmer, we ___________________________
baseball in the park.
could have played
played
could play
can play
> **정답** could play

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Had you not helped me, I
____________________________ on the project.
gave up
give up
would give up
would have given up
> **정답** would have given up

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Went we by subway, it ___________ faster.
would be
is
were
would have been
> **정답** would be

---

**07.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Had it not been for his mistake, we _____________
the work early.
would finish
had finished
would have finished
finished
> **정답** would have finished

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
Had I taken a taxi, I could have been there on time.
If I had taken a taxi, I could have been there on
time.
I took a taxi, so I could be there on time.
I didn't take a taxi, so I could not be there on
time.
If I took a taxi, I could be there on time.
> **정답** If I had taken a taxi, I could have been there on time., I didn't take a taxi, so I could not be there on time.

---

**09.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
If we had the time, we would go to Europe.
As we don't have the time, we won't go to
Europe.
As we have the time, we will go to Europe.
Did we have the time, we would go to Europe.
Had we the time, we would go to Europe.
> **정답** As we don't have the time, we won't go to Europe., Had we the time, we would go to Europe.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
제니가 파티에 왔었더라면 우리는 즐거웠을 것이다.
Had Jenny come to the party, we would have
had fun.
Came Jenny to the party, we would have fun.
If Jenny had come to the party, we would
have had fun.
If Jenny came to the party, we would have
fun.
> **정답** Had Jenny come to the party, we would have had fun., If Jenny had come to the party, we would have had fun.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
내가 부자라면 고급차를 살 텐데.
If I were rich, I would buy a luxury car.
Had I been rich, I would have bought a luxury
car.
Were I rich, I would buy a luxury car.
If I had been rich, I would have bought a
luxury car.
> **정답** Were I rich, I would buy a luxury car., If I were rich, I would buy a luxury car.

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
비가 많이 오지 않는다면, 제주도에 있을텐데.
If it had not been for heavy rain, we would be
in Jeju Island.
If it were not for heavy rain, we would be in
Jeju Island.
Had it not been for heavy rain, we would be in
Jeju Island.
Were it not for heavy rain, we would be in Jeju
Island.
> **정답** If it were not for heavy rain, we would be in Jeju Island., Were it not for heavy rain, we would be in Jeju Island.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
Were I you, I would lend him the money.
Were I a magician, I would fly.
Had it not been for his effort, we could not
have succeeded.
Were it not for you, I would have been lonely.
> **정답** Were it not for you, I would have been lonely.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
If I were you, I wouldn't be angry about small
things.
Were I you, I would have apologized to her
right away.
Had he known my problem, he would have
helped me.
Had it not been for your help, I couldn't have
finished the work.
> **정답** Were I you, I would have apologized to her right away.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
Had he been informed earlier, he wouldn't be
late.
If I had called him, he wouldn't have been
late.
If it were not for the test, all the students
would be happy.
If I were in your place, I would quit
immediately.
> **정답** Had he been informed earlier, he wouldn't be late.

---

**16.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
Had I enough time, I would go out with you.
Were I you, I would listen to the doctor's
advice.
Were Sally not tired, she would have gone to
see a movie.
Had it not been for her support, I could not
have been a writer.
> **정답** Were Sally not tired, she would have gone to see a movie.

---

**17.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 서로 다른 것을 고르시오.
Had he been more careful, he would not have
been in the hospital.
→ If he hadn't been more careful, he would
not be in the hospital.
If It were sunny, I could go hiking with you.
→ Were it sunny, I could go hiking with you.
If he had not broken his leg last month, he
could play football today.
→ Had he not broken his leg last month, he
could play football today.
Had I known Kelly's phone number, I would
have called her.
→ If I had known Kelly's phone number, I
would have called her.
> **정답** Had he been more careful, he would not have been in the hospital. → If he hadn't been more careful, he would not be in the hospital.

---

**18.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 가장 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
그가 오디션에 합격했다면 드라마에서 그를 볼 수 있었을 텐데.
Had he passed the audition, we could see him
in the drama.
Had he passed the audition, we could have
seen him in the drama.
If he passed the audition, we could see him in
the drama.
If he had passed the audition, we could see
him in the drama.
> **정답** Had he passed the audition, we could have seen him in the drama.

---

**19.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 가장 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
내가 부자라면, 가난한 사람을 위한 병원을 지을 텐데.
If I had been rich, I would have built a hospital
for the poor.
If I am rich, I would build a hospital for the
poor.
Were I rich, I would build a hospital for the
poor.
If I were rich, I would have built a hospital for
the poor.
> **정답** Were I rich, I would build a hospital for the poor.

---

**20.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 가장 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
그가 곤경에 처한 것을 알았더라면, 나는 그를 도와주었을
텐데.
Had I known he was in trouble, I would have
helped him.
Had I known he was in trouble, I would help
him.
If I had known he was in trouble, I would help
him.
If I knew he was in trouble, I would help him.
> **정답** Had I known he was in trouble, I would have helped him.
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 156 if의 생략중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 두 문장이 같은 뜻이 되도록 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오. (if를 생략할 것)
If I were more attractive, she would like me.
→  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , she would like
me.
정답 Were, I, more, attractive

---

**02.** 다음 두 문장이 같은 뜻이 되도록 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오. (if를 생략할 것)
If I had known the problem, I could have fixed it.
→  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , I could
have fixed it.
정답 Had, I, known, the, problem

---

**03.** 다음 두 문장이 같은 뜻이 되도록 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오. (if를 생략할 것)
If it were not for his support, I would not start my
own business.
→  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) ,
I would not start my own business.
정답 Were, it, not, for, his, support

---

**04.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (if를 생략할 것)
내가 학생이라면, 영어를 정말 열심히 공부할 텐데.
힌트 (     ) be, a student, study
  (     )   (     )   (     ) , I  (     )  
English very hard.
정답 Were, I, a, student, would, study

---

**05.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (if를 생략할 것)
내가 당신을 봤으면 인사했을 거예요.
힌트 (     ) see, say
  (     )   (     )   (     ) , I  (     )  
 hello.
정답 Had, I, seen, you, would, have, said

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 바르게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
내가 너라면 운동을 더 열심히 할 텐데
힌트 (     ) I, you, exercise, were, would
  (     )   (     ) , I  (     )   (     )  harder.
정답 Were, I, you, would, exercise

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 바르게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
내가 그 파티에 갔더라면 많은 사람들을 만났을 텐데.
힌트 (     ) I, gone, had, to, the party, would, met,
have
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , I
  (     )   (     )  many people.
정답 Had, I, gone, to, the, party, would, have, met

---

**08.** 틀린 부분을 고쳐 문장을 완성하시오.
I won a lottery, I might buy a house.
→  (     )  a lottery, I might buy a
house.
정답 Won I (If I won)

---

**09.** 틀린 부분을 고쳐 문장을 완성하시오.
My mom were a chef, I could eat all kinds of
delicious food.
→  (     )  a chef, I could eat all kinds of
delicious food.
정답 Were my mom (If my mom were)

---

**10.** 틀린 부분을 고쳐 문장을 완성하시오.
You had told me about it earlier, we wouldn't have
made the mistake.
→  (     )  me about it earlier, we
wouldn't have made the mistake.
정답 Had you told (If I had told)

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 156: if의 생략 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I were you, I would accept that offer. → ________________ I you, I would accept that offer.
If Was Were am
> 정답: Were

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I had known about that sale, I would have gone shopping. → __________________ I known about that sale, I would have gone shopping.
If Have Were Had
> 정답: Had

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If the road had not been so icy, we could have driven safely. → ___________________ so icy, we could have driven safely.
The road had not been Had not the road been Have the road not been Had the road not been
> 정답: Had the road not been

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Were it cooler, we ___________________________ soccer in the park.
could have played played could play can play
> 정답: could play

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Had you not guided me, I ____________________________ on the assignment.
gave up give up would give up would have given up
> 정답: would have given up

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Went we by bus, it ___________ cheaper. would be is were would have been
> 정답: would be

---

**07.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Had it not been for her advice, we _____________ the task on time.
would finish had finished would have finished finished
> 정답: would have finished

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Had I taken the bus, I could have been there on time.
If I had taken the bus, I could have been there on time.
I took the bus, so I could be there on time.
I didn't take the bus, so I could not be there on time.
If I took the bus, I could be there on time.
> 정답: If I had taken the bus, I could have been there on time.,

---

**09.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) If we had the money, we would go to Japan.
As we don't have the money, we won't go to Japan.
As we have the money, we will go to Japan.
Did we have the money, we would go to Japan.
Had we the money, we would go to Japan.
> 정답: As we don't have the money, we won't go to Japan.,

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Tom이 행사에 왔었더라면 우리는 즐거웠을 것이다.
Had Tom come to the event, we would have had fun. fun.
Came Tom to the event, we would have fun.
If Tom had come to the event, we would have had fun.
If Tom came to the event, we would have fun.
> 정답: Had Tom come to the event, we would have had fun.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) 내가 유명하다면 팬들을 만날 텐데.
If I were famous, I would meet my fans.
Had I been famous, I would have met my fans.
Were I famous, I would meet my fans.
If I had been famous, I would have met my fans.
> 정답: Were I famous, I would meet my fans., If I were famous, I

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) 폭설이 아니라면, 캠핑장에 있을 텐데.
If it had not been for heavy snow, we would be at the campsite.
If it were not for heavy snow, we would be at the resort. campsite.
Had it not been for heavy snow, we would be at the campsite.
Were it not for heavy snow, we would be at the campsite.
